name: Complete Purchase Flow
description:
As a new user
  I want to complete a full purchase journey
  So that I can register, login, buy a product, and logout successfully

steps.name: the user is on the homepage
the user clicks the "sign up" button
the user submits registration with unique username "newUser123" and password "Password123!"
the user clicks the "login" button
the user login with the registered username and password "Password123!"
the user selects product "Nokia lumia 1520"
the user adds the product to the cart
the user navigates to cart
the user clicks place order

name: User Login
description:
As a registered user
  I want to log in
  So that I can access my account

steps.name: the user is on the homepage
the registration precondition for username "agussumaryanto"
the user clicks the "login" button
the user login with username "agussumaryanto" and password "agussumaryanto"
the username "agussumaryanto" should be visible in the navbar
the user is on the homepage
the user clicks the "login" button
the user login with username "user123" and password "WrongPass!"
an alert message "Wrong password." should be displayed
the user is on the homepage
the user clicks the "login" button
the user login with username "" and password ""
an alert message "Please fill out Username and Password." should be displayed

name: User Logout
description:
As a logged in user
  I want to log out
  So that my session ends securely

steps.name: the user is logged in
the user clicks the "logout" button
the login button should be visible
the logout button should not be visible
the user is logged in

elements.name: Logout button not visible when user is not logged in

steps.name: the user clicks the "logout" button
the username "agussumaryanto" is still visible in the navbar

name: User Signup
description:
As a visitor
  I want to create an account
  So that I can log in to the application

steps.name: the user is on the homepage
the user clicks the "sign up" button
the user submits registration with unique username "user" and password "Password123!"
an alert message "Sign up successful." should be displayed
the user is on the homepage
the registration precondition for username "dupUser123"
the user clicks the "sign up" button
the user submits registration with username "dupUser123" and password "Password"
an alert message "This user already exist." should be displayed
the user is on the homepage
the user clicks the "sign up" button
the user submits registration with username "" and password ""
an alert message "Please fill out Username and Password." should be displayed
